nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to strategically collaborate, usually only on a segment of a project

nodes.label: AI as thought mirror and starting point
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of fundamental errors
nodes.grounding_span: AI is great as an interactive notebook or thought mirror

nodes.label: AI memory and context retention
nodes.grounding_span: It will often start to shift away from previous context

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: it claimed that a fundamental mathematical theory was wrong

nodes.label: Human control over personal expression and code
nodes.grounding_span: I write my own emails and i would rarely want ai help

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: unless its taking too long for me to figure something out

nodes.label: Contextual understanding and improvement
nodes.grounding_span: hope for systems with a better method of understanding

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and human expression
nodes.grounding_span: I want to give my thoughts and feelings, not a guess from a computer

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: My most satisfying moments have come from it helping me flesh out ideas

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's inability to maintain context
nodes.grounding_span: It will often start to shift away from previous context, which becomes very frustrating

nodes.label: Concern about AI replacing jobs
nodes.grounding_span: I don't think AI can take over anything

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: hope for systems with a better method of understanding

nodes.label: Strategic time-boxed collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: I try to keep it on a timer, if I can't get any help from it in a few prompts, probably time to think more about it myself

nodes.label: Verification-oriented approach
nodes.grounding_span: I check it for consistency, since it doesn't KNOW our business
